tasks.build:sdk: cargo run --manifest-path ../../../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts build --source ../../../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_core.ts --out-manifest ../../../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.core@v1.json --ts-out ../../../generated/js/sdks/trellis-core --rust-out ../../../generated/rust/sdks/trellis-core --package-name @trellis/sdk-trellis-core --crate-name trellis-sdk-trellis-core --runtime-source local --runtime-version 0.1.0 --runtime-repo-root ../../.. && cargo run --manifest-path ../../../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts build --source ../../../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_auth.ts --out-manifest ../../../generated/contracts/manifests/trellis.auth@v1.json --ts-out ../../../generated/js/sdks/auth --rust-out ../../../generated/rust/sdks/auth --package-name @trellis/sdk-auth --crate-name trellis-sdk-auth --runtime-source local --runtime-version 0.1.0 --runtime-repo-root ../../..
tasks.verify:contracts: cargo run --manifest-path ../../../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts verify --source ../../../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_core.ts && cargo run --manifest-path ../../../rust/Cargo.toml -p trellis-cli --bin trellis -- contracts verify --source ../../../js/services/trellis/contracts/trellis_auth.ts
